urdu transliteration text:
Tujhko ik baar dafan, baba tere kardenge
Once your father (Imam Hussain) will bury you
Phir tujhe neze sakifa ke wahan dhoondenge
english translation text: Then they will look for you with their spears

urdu transliteration text: Dasht ki gharm hawaoon se chupalun
english translation text: Let me hide you from the warm winds of the desert

urdu transliteration text: Aaj ki raat tujhe godhi mein sulaloon mere asghar aaja
english translation text: Let me put you to sleep in my lap tonight, come my Asghar
